sql.where:
Q.QC_USAGE = 'Y'
AND Q.QC_ODATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND Q.QC_ODATE >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)), -6)
AND Q.QC_ODATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND Q.QC_STATUS = #{status}
AND ( UPPER(Q.QC_ID) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(Q.QC_LOT) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(Q.QC_CONTENT) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(Q.QC_DIRECTOR) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, A.* FROM ( SELECT Q.QC_ID AS qcId, Q.QC_LOT AS qcLot,
Q.QC_TYPE AS qcType,
Q.QC_CONTENT AS qcContent,
Q.QC_QTY AS qcQty,
Q.QC_STATUS AS qcStatus,
Q.QC_ODATE AS qcOdate,
Q.QC_WORKER AS qcWorker, EW.EMP_NAME AS workerName,
Q.QC_DIRECTOR AS qcDirector, ED.EMP_NAME AS directorName,
Q.QC_DMSG AS qcDmsg,
Q.QC_DATE AS qcDate,
Q.QC_WMSG AS qcWmsg,
Q.QC_PASS_QTY AS qcPassQty,
NVL(D.DEF_QTY, 0) AS failQty,
CASE WHEN NVL(Q.QC_QTY, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( LEAST(NVL(D.DEF_QTY, 0), Q.QC_QTY) / Q.QC_QTY * 100 , 1) END AS failRate,
Q.QC_USAGE AS qcUsage
FROM QC Q
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DLOG_QCID, SUM(NVL(DLOG_QTY, 0)) AS DEF_QTY FROM DEF_LOG GROUP BY DLOG_QCID ) D ON Q.QC_ID = D.DLOG_QCID
LEFT JOIN EMP EW ON Q.QC_WORKER = EW.EMP_ID
LEFT JOIN EMP ED ON Q.QC_DIRECTOR = ED.EMP_ID
ORDER BY Q.QC_ID DESC
) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{page.endRow} ) WHERE RN >= #{page.startRow}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM QC Q
Q.QC_USAGE = 'Y'
AND Q.QC_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND Q.QC_DATE >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)), -6)
AND Q.QC_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND Q.QC_STATUS = #{qcStatus}
AND ( UPPER(Q.QC_ID) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(Q.QC_LOT) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(Q.QC_CONTENT) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') )

SELECT NVL(SUM(Q.QC_QTY), 0) AS todayQty,
NVL(SUM(Q.QC_QTY - NVL(D.DEF_QTY, 0)), 0) AS passQty,
NVL(SUM(NVL(D.DEF_QTY, 0)), 0) AS failQty,
CASE WHEN NVL(SUM(Q.QC_QTY), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( NVL(SUM(NVL(D.DEF_QTY, 0)), 0) / SUM(Q.QC_QTY) * 100 , 1) END AS failRate
FROM QC Q
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DLOG_QCID, SUM(NVL(DLOG_QTY, 0)) AS DEF_QTY FROM DEF_LOG GROUP BY DLOG_QCID ) D ON Q.QC_ID = D.DLOG_QCID
WHERE Q.QC_USAGE = 'Y' AND Q.QC_STATUS = 30 AND TRUNC(Q.QC_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24))

SELECT Q.QC_ID AS qcId, Q.QC_LOT AS qcLot,
L.LOT_ITEM AS itemId, L.LOT_QTY AS lotQty, L.LOT_CQTY AS lotCqty, I.ITEM_NAME AS itemName,
Q.QC_TYPE AS qcType, QT.QC_TYPE_NAME AS qcTypeName,
Q.QC_CONTENT AS qcContent,
Q.QC_QTY AS qcQty,
Q.QC_STATUS AS qcStatus, QS.QC_STATUS_NAME AS qcStatusName,
Q.QC_ODATE AS qcOdate,
Q.QC_DIRECTOR AS qcDirector, ED.EMP_NAME AS directorName,
Q.QC_DMSG AS qcDmsg,
Q.QC_DATE AS qcDate,
Q.QC_WORKER AS qcWorker, EW.EMP_NAME AS workerName,
Q.QC_WMSG AS qcWmsg,
Q.QC_PASS_QTY AS qcPassQty,
L.LOT_BWHSEC AS bwhsec, L.LOT_BWHSEC AS secId, SUBSTR(L.LOT_BWHSEC, 1, INSTR(L.LOT_BWHSEC, '-') - 1) AS whId,
Q.QC_USAGE AS qcUsage,
NVL(D.DEF_QTY, 0) AS failQty,
CASE WHEN NVL(Q.QC_QTY, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( LEAST(NVL(D.DEF_QTY, 0), Q.QC_QTY) / Q.QC_QTY * 100 , 1) END AS failRate
FROM QC Q
LEFT JOIN LOT L ON Q.QC_LOT = L.LOT_ID
LEFT JOIN ITEM I ON L.LOT_ITEM = I.ITEM_ID
LEFT JOIN QC_TYPE QT ON Q.QC_TYPE = QT.QC_TYPE_NO
LEFT JOIN QC_STATUS QS ON Q.QC_STATUS = QS.QC_STATUS_NO
LEFT JOIN EMP ED ON Q.QC_DIRECTOR = ED.EMP_ID
LEFT JOIN EMP EW ON Q.QC_WORKER = EW.EMP_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DLOG_QCID, SUM(NVL(DLOG_QTY, 0)) AS DEF_QTY FROM DEF_LOG GROUP BY DLOG_QCID ) D ON Q.QC_ID = D.DLOG_QCID
WHERE Q.QC_ID = #{qcId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO QC ( QC_ID, QC_LOT, QC_TYPE, QC_CONTENT, QC_QTY, QC_STATUS, QC_ODATE, QC_DIRECTOR, QC_DMSG, QC_WORKER, QC_WMSG, QC_PASS_QTY, QC_USAGE ) VALUES ( 'QC' || QC_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{qcLot}, #{qcType}, #{qcContent}, #{qcQty}, #{qcStatus}, SYSDATE + (9/24), #{qcDirector}, #{qcDmsg}, #{qcWorker}, #{qcWmsg}, #{qcPassQty}, 'Y' )
mapper.update: UPDATE QC SET QC_DMSG = #{qcDmsg}, QC_ODATE = SYSDATE + (9/24), QC_WORKER = #{qcWorker} WHERE QC_ID = #{qcId} AND QC_USAGE = 'Y' AND QC_STATUS IN (10, 20)
mapper.select:
SELECT EMP_ID AS empId, EMP_NAME AS empName FROM EMP
EMP_DEPTNO = 20 AND EMP_INOFFICE = 0
AND ( UPPER(EMP_ID) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{_parameter} || '%') OR UPPER(EMP_NAME) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{_parameter} || '%') )
ORDER BY EMP_ID

SELECT L.LOT_ID AS lotId, L.LOT_QTY AS lotQty, L.LOT_ITEM AS itemId, I.ITEM_NAME AS itemName, I.ITEM_QC_TYPE AS itemQcType, QT.QC_TYPE_NAME AS itemQcTypeName FROM LOT L LEFT JOIN ITEM I ON L.LOT_ITEM = I.ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN QC_TYPE QT ON I.ITEM_QC_TYPE = QT.QC_TYPE_NO WHERE L.LOT_QC = 'N' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM QC Q WHERE Q.QC_LOT = L.LOT_ID AND Q.QC_USAGE = 'Y' ) ORDER BY L.LOT_ID DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE QC SET QC_STATUS = #{qcStatus}, QC_PASS_QTY = #{qcPassQty}, QC_WMSG = #{qcWmsg}, QC_DATE = sysdate + (9/24) WHERE QC_ID = #{qcId}
UPDATE LOT SET LOT_CQTY = #{inQty}, LOT_FQTY = #{inQty}, LOT_AWHSEC = #{awhsec}, LOT_STATUS = 10, LOT_QC = 'Y' WHERE LOT_ID = #{qcLot}
mapper.select: SELECT DEF_TYPE_ID AS defTypeId, DEF_TYPE_NAME AS defTypeName, DEF_STANDARD_ACTION AS defStandardAction FROM DEFECT WHERE DEF_USAGE = 'Y' ORDER BY DEF_TYPE_ID

SELECT DL.DLOG_QCID AS qcId, DL.DLOG_DEF AS defType, D.DEF_TYPE_NAME AS defTypeName, DL.DLOG_QTY AS defQty, DL.DLOG_ACTION AS defAction, DL.DLOG_DISPOSE AS defDiscard FROM DEF_LOG DL LEFT JOIN DEFECT D ON DL.DLOG_DEF = D.DEF_TYPE_ID WHERE DL.DLOG_QCID = #{qcId} ORDER BY DL.DLOG_ID
mapper.update:
UPDATE STOCK SET STOCK_PREV_QTY = NVL(STOCK_PREV_QTY, 0) - #{disposeQty},
STOCK_AVAIL_QTY = NVL(STOCK_AVAIL_QTY, 0) + #{inQty}
WHERE STOCK_ITEM = ( SELECT LOT_ITEM FROM LOT WHERE LOT_ID = #{qcLot} )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM QC WHERE QC_ID = #{qcId} AND QC_STATUS != 30 )
mapper.select:
SELECT W.WH_ID AS whId, W.WH_NAME AS whName, W.WH_TYPE AS whTypeNo
FROM ITEM I
INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON I.ITEM_WHTYPE = W.WH_TYPE
WHERE I.ITEM_ID = #{itemId} AND W.WH_USAGE = 'Y'
ORDER BY W.WH_ID

SELECT S.WH_SEC_ID AS secId, S.WH_SEC_QTY AS secQty, NVL(LOT_SUM.secPrevQty, 0) AS secPrevQty FROM WH_SEC S
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN L.LOT_QC = 'N' THEN L.LOT_BWHSEC WHEN L.LOT_QC = 'Y' THEN L.LOT_AWHSEC END AS secId, COUNT(L.LOT_ID) AS secPrevQty FROM LOT L WHERE L.LOT_STATUS NOT IN (0, 30) GROUP BY CASE WHEN L.LOT_QC = 'N' THEN L.LOT_BWHSEC WHEN L.LOT_QC = 'Y' THEN L.LOT_AWHSEC END ) LOT_SUM ON S.WH_SEC_ID = LOT_SUM.secId
WHERE S.WH_SEC_WHID = #{whId} AND S.WH_SEC_USAGE = 'Y'
ORDER BY S.WH_SEC_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DEF_LOG ( DLOG_ID, DLOG_QCID, DLOG_DEF, DLOG_QTY, DLOG_ACTION, DLOG_DISPOSE ) VALUES ( 'DLOG' || DLOG_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{qcId}, #{defType}, #{defQty}, #{defAction}, #{defDiscard} )
mapper.select:
SELECT L.LOT_ID AS lotId, L.LOT_QTY AS lotQty, L.LOT_ITEM AS itemId, I.ITEM_NAME AS itemName,
I.ITEM_QC_TYPE AS itemQcType, QT.QC_TYPE_NAME AS itemQcTypeName
FROM LOT L
LEFT JOIN ITEM I ON L.LOT_ITEM = I.ITEM_ID
LEFT JOIN QC_TYPE QT ON I.ITEM_QC_TYPE = QT.QC_TYPE_NO
WHERE L.LOT_ID = #{lotId} AND L.LOT_QC = 'N' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM QC Q WHERE Q.QC_LOT = L.LOT_ID AND Q.QC_USAGE = 'Y' )
